body:
Hi Amara, I wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week about the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) portfolio review. I've been doing some additional digging into the climate data infrastructure space and I think there are two or three emerging teams worth getting eyes on before the Q2 cycle heats up. One in particular is doing something genuinely novel around satellite-derived emissions monitoring that I think would fit squarely in your thesis. Would it be helpful if I put together a short brief on each of them and sent it over by end of week? Happy to jump on a call if you'd rather talk through it first.

Best,
Sarah
